rulings.Case Title: DOLYE D GREEN et al VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, DECEMBER 9, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Riley Power, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: DOLYE D GREEN et al VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, DECEMBER 9, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Certainteed Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden of production under Aguilar. Plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Green¿s exposure to asbestos-containing products attributable to defendant (asbestos cement pipe) was a substantial factor in causing his mesothelioma pursuant to Texas law, including Borg-Warner v. Flores (Texas 2007) 232 S.W.3d 765; Georgia-Pacific Corp. v. Stephens (Tex. App. 2007) 239 S.W.3d 304; Georgia-Pacific Corp. v. Bostic (Tex. App. 2010) 320 S.W.3d 588; Smith v. Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc. (Tex. App. 2010) 307 S.W.3d 829. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
